jobs.title: Product Manager Sr
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 4-5 years of experience as a Senior Product Manager, coupled with strong skills in product lifecycle management, analytics, reliability, and governance, aligns exceptionally well with a 'Product Manager Sr' role at an enterprise company like PNC.

jobs.title: Product Manager Lead
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's robust experience in product reliability, analytics platforms, and end-to-end product lifecycle management, coupled with strong technical skills and an MBA, presents a very strong skill match for a Product Manager Lead role, though their 5 years of experience position them at the early end of this seniority level.

jobs.title: Product Manager II - Investment Office Product Management
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 5 years of product management experience, strong background in analytics, reliability, and governance, coupled with an MBA focusing on financial systems, aligns well with a Product Manager II role within an Investment Office, despite the lack of direct finance product experience in their past roles.

jobs.title: Credit Product Manager
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's nearly five years of product management, strong analytical, and technical skills align well with a Product Manager role, despite lacking explicit credit product domain experience, which could be offset by transferable skills and MBA coursework.
